title: 023 – ORES Electricity – Number of customers with decentralised production(s) per locality (Annual) (ORES)
description:
[Publisher: ORES] Name of the report : Number of decentralised productions by location
Level of aggregation : The dataset contains information by energy carrier (electricity/gas), geographical area, consumer type and location.
Year of consumption : Year concerned
Scope : Reporting of all access points with a connection on 31 December was contractually active in December of the relevant year of consumption.
Energy : electricity
Frequency : Annually
Feeding in / acceptance : decrease
Consumption:
the amount of energy consumed (natural gas or electricity) recorded by a meter in an indoor installation.
Electricity or natural gas can be taken from and/or fed into the distribution system from an access point.
The acceptance corresponds to the purchase of electricity and / or natural gas on the distribution network.
The feed-in corresponds to the surplus of energy generated by the distribution system user himself, but not consumed for his own purposes, but fed into the distribution system.
Geographical area : "The geographical areas correspond to the areas of the former intermunicipals before the merger. These are territorial subdivisions of ORES Assets, which include some shareholders (affiliated municipalities and financial inter-municipalities) by geographical area. 
The following link will take you to the list of municipalities allocated to the geographical area."
https://www.oresassets.be/fr/territoires-d-activites-et-secteurs
Location : A place is a territorial unit of definite or indefinite area that is generally inhabited. A municipality generally corresponds to either a town with surrounding villages, several nearby villages or a single central village with surrounding hamlets. The term ‘place’ refers to these municipal subdivisions. 
Number of manufacturers : Number of points in the distribution grid (simple EAN) at which the produced electricity can be fed. Different types of production can be connected at a single point in the network.
EAN : EAN Code (English abbreviation for European Article Numbering). Unique identification code of an access point (supply point). This code shall be communicated by the DSO to the customer concerned.


Type of production : Type of plant that enables energy production. In the event that an EAN is injected via two different decentralized production facilities, the production type is the most powerful type.
